inputs.text: Ab toh meree khaansi shuru ho gayi hai, sookhi khaansi

hypotheses.label: Viral fever

inputs.text: Main raat ko bahut pasina aata hai, aur meree wazan bhi kam ho rahi hai
inputs.image_desc: prescription from previous PHC visit shown

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Night sweats and weight loss are cardinal signs of Tuberculosis

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Less likely, as bronchitis does not typically cause night sweats and weight loss

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Possible, but less likely than Tuberculosis at this stage

inputs.text: Ab toh meree khaansi mein khoon bhi aa raha hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Blood in sputum is a confirming symptom of Tuberculosis

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, as bronchitis does not typically cause blood in sputum

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, as pneumonia does not typically cause chronic cough and weight loss
